ANTHROPIC_API_KEY.description: Optional: lets Claude Code act as your interviewer (metered API billing). Leave blank to use GitHub Copilot (no key needed) or practice solo.

CLAUDE_CODE_OAUTH_TOKEN.description: Optional: Claude Pro/Max subscription token from 'claude setup-token' (no per-token billing). Do not set together with ANTHROPIC_API_KEY — the API key wins.

OPENAI_API_KEY.description: Optional: lets OpenAI Codex act as your interviewer. Leave blank to use GitHub Copilot (no key needed) or practice solo.
